sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14803" key="a)rgo/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργό-βῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sedentary,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:120" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.120</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
